settings.title: Brew guide
settings.content: We drink this as a pour-over: 1:16 ratio, water just off the boil at 96°C, total brew time around three minutes. It also holds up well as espresso, where the stone fruit turns jammy.

settings.title: Sourcing & producer
settings.content: Sourced from smallholder farms organized around a central washing station. We publish what we know about every lot — the farm, the elevation, the process — and pay above C-market rates.

settings.title: Shipping & freshness
settings.content: Every bag is roasted after you order and ships within two business days. We recommend brewing between five days and five weeks off roast — the roast date is printed on the bag.
